phrases.intent_en: Where is the Stone of Remembrance memorial
phrases.text_local: Wo steht der Stein der Erinnerung?
phrases.cultural_note: Memorial is explicitly noted as separate and in the basement; signage is likely provided.

likely_response.local: Im Untergeschoss, folgen Sie den Schildern.
likely_response.translation_en: In the basement, follow the signs.

responses.english: In the basement, follow the signs.
responses.french: Im Untergeschoss, folgen Sie den Schildern.

phrases.intent_en: Is the audioguide available at the desk

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Düsseldorf synagogue models
